name: Positional Warfare
descriptionTemplate: When commanding armored units in range of your own or an ally's territory, -X% damage received. When being attacked by enemy generals, additionally reflect 50% of the damage dealt from this attack

progression.renderedDesc: When commanding armored units in range of your own or an ally's territory, -15% damage received. When being attacked by enemy generals, additionally reflect 50% of the damage dealt from this attack
progression.renderedDescFr: Lorsque vous commandez des unités blindées in portée of your own or an ally's territory, -15% dégâts received. When being attacked by ennemi generals, additionally reflect 50% of the dégâts dealt from this attaque

longDesc: Compétence spécifique à un général. « Positional Warfare » monte jusqu'au niveau 5. Au niveau maximum (5), elle applique l'effet suivant : « Lorsque vous commandez des unités blindées in portée of your own or an ally's territory, -35% dégâts received. When being attacked by ennemi generals, additionally reflect 50% of the dégâts dealt from this attaque ». Compétence signature liée à une carte précise, à niveauer quand on investit dans ce général.
longDescEn: A general-specific skill. "Positional Warfare" scales up to level 5. At max level (5), the skill applies the following effect: "When commanding armored units in range of your own or an ally's territory, -35% damage received. When being attacked by enemy generals, additionally reflect 50% of the damage dealt from this attack". A signature tied to a specific card, worth levelling whenever you invest in that general.
longDescDe: Eine generalspezifische Fähigkeit. „Positional Warfare“ skaliert bis Stufe 5. Auf Maximalstufe (5) wirkt folgender Effekt: „When commanding armored units in range of your own or an ally's territory, -35% damage received. When being attacked by enemy generals, additionally reflect 50% of the damage dealt from this attack“. Eine an eine bestimmte Karte gebundene Signatur, die beim Investieren geleveled werden sollte.
